overallInterpretation: The artifact shows Vitest terminal output with 13 passing tests across three suites: pointInPolygon (6 tests covering inside/outside for unit square, triangle, and half-plane), initTileDensity (4 tests covering full, partial-triangle, half-bottom, and half-left tiles), and initChunkDensity (3 tests covering all-solid, all-empty, and mixed-tile chunks). All 13 tests passed in 431ms, well within the 5000ms expected duration. The output matches the expected description exactly: terminal output from unit tests showing point-in-polygon, tile density initialisation, and chunk density with mixed tiles.

artifacts.interpretation: Vitest run of engine/tilemap/polygon.test.ts producing 13 passing tests (0 failures) across pointInPolygon, initTileDensity, and initChunkDensity suites. Duration 431ms. Output confirms correct point-in-polygon classification, tile-level density sampling for various polygon shapes, and chunk-level density aggregation including mixed-tile scenarios.
